requirement_topic.en: Argentine Market Access — S-mark, In-Country Importer (CUIT), Energy Labelling and Import Clearance
requirement_topic.zh: 阿根廷市场准入——S标志、在地进口商（CUIT）、能效标签及进口清关
requirement_topic.zht: 阿根廷市場准入——S標誌、在地進口商（CUIT）、能效標籤及進口清關

summary.en: Non-Argentine manufacturers placing portable lithium batteries or power banks on the Argentine market must satisfy the following market-access obligations: (1) S-safety mark — affixed after completing the Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification (Resolucion 169/2018 and successors) via IRAM or a recognized certifier for in-scope low-voltage apparatus. (2) In-country importer with CUIT — Argentina requires a locally established importer or representative holding a CUIT (Clave Unica de Identificacion Tributaria) registered with AFIP/ARCA; this importer is the responsible party for customs clearance, certification holding, and consumer-protection compliance. A foreign manufacturer cannot place product directly without this local economic operator. (3) Energy-efficiency labelling — where the product falls within a labelled appliance category administered by the Secretaria de Energia, the mandatory efficiency label applies. (4) Import clearance — products are declared through Aduana (customs) under the SIRA/import-licensing framework in force, with Spanish-language documentation and the importer's CUIT. There is no national battery-EPR registration; waste obligations sit under general hazardous-waste and provincial/municipal rules.
summary.zh: 非阿根廷制造商将便携式锂电池或移动电源投放阿根廷市场，须履行以下市场准入义务：（1）S安全标志——对适用范围内低压装置，经IRAM或认可认证机构完成贸易秘书处电气安全认证（Resolucion 169/2018及后续法规）后加贴。（2）持CUIT的在地进口商——阿根廷要求由在地设立、持有CUIT（唯一税务识别码、在AFIP/ARCA注册）的进口商或代表；该进口商为海关清关、持证及消费者保护合规的责任方。外国制造商不能在缺少该在地经济运营商的情况下直接投放产品。（3）能效标签——当产品属于能源秘书处管理的标签类家电类别时，须适用强制能效标签。（4）进口清关——产品经海关（Aduana）依据现行SIRA/进口许可框架申报，附西班牙文文件及进口商CUIT。无国家电池EPR注册；废物义务归于一般危险废物及省/市级规则。
summary.zht: 非阿根廷製造商將便攜式鋰電池或行動電源投放阿根廷市場，須履行以下市場准入義務：（1）S安全標誌——對適用範圍內低壓裝置，經IRAM或認可認證機構完成貿易秘書處電氣安全認證（Resolucion 169/2018及後續法規）後加貼。（2）持CUIT的在地進口商——阿根廷要求由在地設立、持有CUIT（唯一稅務識別碼、在AFIP/ARCA註冊）的進口商或代表；該進口商為海關清關、持證及消費者保護合規的責任方。外國製造商不能在缺少該在地經濟運營商的情況下直接投放產品。（3）能效標籤——當產品屬於能源秘書處管理的標籤類家電類別時，須適用強制能效標籤。（4）進口清關——產品經海關（Aduana）依據現行SIRA/進口許可框架申報，附西班牙文文件及進口商CUIT。無國家電池EPR註冊；廢物義務歸於一般危險廢物及省/市級規則。

standards_or_laws: Resolucion 169/2018 and successors — Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification and S-mark
Customs / import framework administered by ARCA-Aduana (formerly AFIP/DGA) — import declaration and licensing; CUIT registration of the importer
Energy-efficiency labelling regime — Secretaria de Energia — mandatory for appliance categories in scope
Ley 24.240 — Consumer Protection (Defensa del Consumidor) — Spanish-language information and importer responsibility

summary.en: China's domestic market access for lithium battery products uses a different framework: CCC (China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA/SAMR) is mandatory for certain rechargeable battery product categories sold domestically (e.g., mobile-phone lithium batteries are CCC-listed). CCC is a Chinese domestic requirement and is NOT recognised by Argentina; it does not substitute for the S-mark. Chinese manufacturers do not need a foreign in-country importer for domestic Chinese sales, and there is no Chinese equivalent of the Argentine CUIT-importer requirement, energy-efficiency label, or Spanish-language consumer-information duty for exporters.
summary.zh: 中国国内锂电池产品市场准入采用不同框架：CCC（中国强制认证，由CNCA/SAMR管理）对某些在国内销售的可充电电池产品类别为强制性（如手机锂电池已列入CCC目录）。CCC属于中国国内要求，不被阿根廷认可，不可替代S标志。中国制造商在国内销售时无需外国在地进口商，对于出口商也无等同于阿根廷CUIT进口商要求、能效标签或西班牙文消费者信息义务的对应制度。
summary.zht: 中國國內鋰電池產品市場准入採用不同框架：CCC（中國強制認證，由CNCA/SAMR管理）對某些在國內銷售的可充電電池產品類別為強制性（如手機鋰電池已列入CCC目錄）。CCC屬於中國國內要求，不被阿根廷認可，不可替代S標誌。中國製造商在國內銷售時無需外國在地進口商，對於出口商也無等同於阿根廷CUIT進口商要求、能效標籤或西班牙文消費者信息義務的對應制度。

standards_or_laws: CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA/SAMR) — domestic China market access only; not recognised in Argentina
China Energy Label (中国能效标识) — domestic energy-efficiency labelling for listed product categories

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers exporting portable batteries to Argentina face structural market-access gaps with no Chinese domestic equivalent: (1) the S-mark via IRAM or a recognized certifier is required for in-scope low-voltage apparatus and is not transferable from CCC; (2) an in-country importer holding a CUIT registered with ARCA/Aduana is mandatory — the foreign manufacturer cannot place product directly and must contract or establish a local responsible party; (3) where the product is a labelled appliance category, the mandatory energy-efficiency label applies; (4) import clearance runs through the SIRA/import-licensing framework with Spanish-language documentation, and consumer information must be in Spanish under Ley 24.240. There is NO national battery-EPR registration as in the EU; waste-battery obligations are handled at importer/distributor level under general hazardous-waste and provincial/municipal rules. CCC certification does not transfer to any of these Argentine requirements.
gap.zh: 向阿根廷出口便携式电池的中国制造商面临在中国国内无对应制度的结构性市场准入差距：（1）对适用范围内低压装置，须经IRAM或认可认证机构取得S标志，且不能由CCC转移；（2）须有在ARCA/海关注册、持CUIT的在地进口商——外国制造商不能直接投放产品，须签约或设立在地责任方；（3）当产品属标签类家电类别时，须适用强制能效标签；（4）进口清关经SIRA/进口许可框架办理，附西班牙文文件，且消费者信息须依Ley 24.240为西班牙文。不存在欧盟式国家电池EPR注册；废旧电池义务在进口商/分销商层面依据一般危险废物及省/市级规则处理。CCC认证不能转移至上述任何阿根廷要求。
gap.zht: 向阿根廷出口便攜式電池的中國製造商面臨在中國國內無對應制度的結構性市場准入差距：（1）對適用範圍內低壓裝置，須經IRAM或認可認證機構取得S標誌，且不能由CCC轉移；（2）須有在ARCA/海關註冊、持CUIT的在地進口商——外國製造商不能直接投放產品，須簽約或設立在地責任方；（3）當產品屬標籤類家電類別時，須適用強制能效標籤；（4）進口清關經SIRA/進口許可框架辦理，附西班牙文文件，且消費者信息須依Ley 24.240為西班牙文。不存在歐盟式國家電池EPR註冊；廢舊電池義務在進口商/分銷商層面依據一般危險廢物及省/市級規則處理。CCC認證不能轉移至上述任何阿根廷要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — S-mark electrical-safety certification (where in scope), an in-country importer holding a CUIT, energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope appliance categories, and SIRA/customs import clearance with Spanish-language documentation apply before market placement; NO EU-style national battery-EPR registration exists
mandatory_status.cn: CCC certification mandatory for domestically-sold products in applicable categories; no equivalent of the Argentine CUIT-importer requirement, S-mark, or per-country battery-EPR registration applies to Chinese exporters under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese portable battery and power bank exporters must address Argentine market-access obligations before entry: the S-mark electrical-safety certification (where in scope), an in-country importer holding a CUIT, energy-efficiency labelling for in-scope appliance categories, and SIRA/customs clearance with Spanish-language documentation. Unlike the EU, Argentina has no national battery-EPR registration. CCC certification does not transfer to or substitute for any of these Argentine requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国便携式电池及移动电源出口商在进入阿根廷前，须应对市场准入义务：S标志电气安全认证（适用范围内）、持CUIT的在地进口商、属于范围内家电类别的能效标签，以及附西班牙文文件的SIRA/海关清关。与欧盟不同，阿根廷无国家电池EPR注册。CCC认证无法转移或替代上述任何阿根廷要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國便攜式電池及行動電源出口商在進入阿根廷前，須應對市場准入義務：S標誌電氣安全認證（適用範圍內）、持CUIT的在地進口商、屬於範圍內家電類別的能效標籤，以及附西班牙文文件的SIRA/海關清關。與歐盟不同，阿根廷無國家電池EPR註冊。CCC認證無法轉移或替代上述任何阿根廷要求。

source.publisher: Gobierno de Argentina — Seguridad Electrica / Importacion (Secretaria de Comercio, ARCA-Aduana)
